response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience, genuine developer-tooling contributions (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators), and some mobile exposure (iOS/Apple TV). However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no people-management experience, no direct reports, and no organizational-change leadership. The profile fits a senior/staff IC track, not an Engineering Manager position.
strengths: Deep, broad software development experience (15+ years) well above the 8-year minimum
Hands-on developer-tools background: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI servers, device orchestration tooling, MCP code generators
Strong quality-engineering culture: TDD, code katas, workshops, and teaching (Selenium course, conference talks)
concerns: No people-management experience — the core requirement of this manager role
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or leading organizational change
Mobile experience is limited and dated (one iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016) versus the role's mobile-platform ecosystem focus

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
No formal technical leadership or org-change track record
